title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Ergo

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Ergo
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!
